Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Input The user provides two event logs for a hiring process Group A Protected Group and Group B Unprotected Group Group A cases P001 P002 P003 have LocalResident FALSE ProfessionalAssociation None ScoreAdjustment 0 Group B cases U001 U002 U003 have LocalResident TRUE U001 and U003 have ProfessionalAssociation LocalBusinessLeadersClub and get +5 Association Boost to CulturalFit U002 has None and 0 adjustment Key details Group A no adjustments Decisions P001 Hired 857065 P002 Not Hired 787560 P003 Hired 826865 Group B boost for association

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify the Core Question Which log exhibits bias Group B How does it manifest Through systematic +5 score adjustment for CulturalFit based on membership in LocalBusinessLeadersClub which correlates with local residency Implications creates unequal treatment advantages specific subgroup violates meritbased principles

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Data for Evidence Group A Decisions based purely on raw scores P001 65 CF Hired P002 60 CF Not Hired P003 65 CF Hired Threshold around CulturalFit 65 Group B U001 raw CF 60 adjusted to 65 Hired U002 raw CF 60 no adjustment Not Hired U003 raw CF 58 adjusted to 63 Hired ScoreAdjustment column explicitly +5 Association Boost for U001 U003 Bias institutionalized in process for Group B

Name: Validation - PE
Text: SelfCorrectionVerification during drafting Check data P001 CF65 Hired P002 CF60 Not Hired P003 CF65 Hired U001 raw60 adjusted65 Hired U002 raw60 Not Hired U003 raw58 adjusted63 Hired anomaly suggests boost influences beyond threshold or flexible standards note as evidence of compounded bias or inconsistent standards Labeling Protected Unprotected unusual but focus on mechanism

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Implications for Fairness Equity Violation of MeritBased Hiring Disparate Treatment Impact professional association correlates with socioeconomic status creates disparate impact risks violating equal employment opportunity Erosion of Transparency Trust LongTerm Organizational Risk homogenizes workforce reduces diversity legal challenges

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
